title: Special Use Permit for Muslim Funeral Home at 4400 South Salina Street with Site Improvements
summary: Special use permit for a Muslim funeral service home at 4400 South Salina Street and West Glen Avenue. Services involve brief family ceremonies usually under one hour. Site improvements include adding sidewalks, curbing, and organized parking to a currently 100% paved vacant building, improving pedestrian and vehicular safety. Applied for by LaBella Associates under the 2023 zoning code.
